description: Style NoteHow many summer outfits can really beat the heat? This cap from roxy does the trick and does it in style. We know pastel shades for the summer aren't "groundbreaking" but we love them in this piece!Product DetailsPink upper with silver branding on the left side of the crown frontSame coloured branding all over the front of the crownEyelets at the sides and back for ventilationCurved visor with stitch detailAdjustable back strap with Velcro closureMaterial and Care100% cottonWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
